name: Online Core Bugfix
scope: Focused online bugfix on top of the v2.6.0 core
changes: BUG1: STOP attribution fixed — actor index captured before switchTurn so actorName/message name the player who actually threw, not the next one

BUG2: unified turn rule for action button and START guard (isLocalTurn requires remote AND local agreement); blockIfNotTurn no longer trusts a stale lastRemoteTurnIndex, closing the double-throw window synchronously
BUG3: removed unreachable duplicate legacy gate line
Bumped version metadata to 2.6.1 (cache, manifest, app_version)
